name: T-Mobile South, LLC v. City of Roswell, Georgia
question: Does a document stating that an application has been denied without providing reasons for the denial comply with the "in writing" requirement of the Telecommunications Act?
description: A case in which the Court held that the Telecommunications Act of 1996 does not require localities to provide reasons for their denial of construction applications in the written denial notification as long as the reasons appear in some other sufficiently clear written record.
